staleness.notes: MC JSON is 5h old (updated 09:52 ET). Wilma committed OOM fix at 14:46 UTC. Pipeline should run fresh tomorrow 6am.

accuracy.mape_note: 91% MAPE is almost certainly a calculation bug, not real accuracy. Investigate: likely dividing by near-zero actuals inflating the percentage. Entity MAE of 9.4 min is the real signal.

worst_parks.note: Persistent overprediction — has been bad since at least Feb 27 (accuracy_report shows +17.8)
Epic Universe overpredicting. Per-entity models deployed 2026-03-05, may need more training data.
From Feb 27 accuracy report. May have improved since — need fresher per-park data.

accuracy.notes: WTI MAE 6.8 is acceptable (green threshold <7). But IA +17.1 and EU +15.1 are red flags dragging the average. MAPE 91% needs investigation — likely a division-by-near-zero bug.

infrastructure.notes: Disk at 90% on main is critical. Need to clean old logs, old Discord sync commits, or move data. Data disk at 4% is fine.

config_drift.notes: Forecast params are correct post-fix. Three housekeeping items flagged.

discrepancies: Gazoo said training OOM'd — it was actually the forecast step that OOM'd. Wilma corrected this in #fred-wilma.

🔴 Investigate MAPE 91% — almost certainly a calculation bug in evaluate_forecast_accuracy.py. Division by near-zero actuals?
🔴 Disk at 90% — clean old logs or move data before it fills
🟡 EU overprediction (+15.1) — per-entity models deployed Mar 5, may need more training cycles

🟢 Deploy inverse_freq weighting — won experiment, not in production
